description_long: This is a pair of tall, rugged brown boots with multiple gray straps and gold buckles running horizontally up the shaft. The boots have a slightly worn, utilitarian appearance, suitable for outdoor or urban exploration. One boot contains a visible rolled-up piece of light gray cloth or fabric tucked inside, adding a touch of realism and suggesting recent use. The interior of the boots is colored blue, contrasting with the earthy exterior. The boots are constructed with thick soles and reinforced toe and heel areas, indicating durability and protection. The overall design is practical, with a focus on function and comfort for walking or standing for extended periods.
description: A pair of tall brown boots with gray straps and gold buckles, featuring a blue interior and a rolled-up cloth inside one boot. The boots have a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for urban or outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boots, the blue interior, and a rolled-up cloth inside the right boot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled-up cloth protruding from the right boot and the arrangement of straps and buckles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the boots, the full length of the straps, and the absence of the cloth detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue interior of the left boot and the side profile of the straps and buckles.
attribute_lacing_style: no laces, multiple horizontal straps with buckles
